title: SamuraiDestroy's Beyond
description: A magic, exploration and tech mod that adds numerous new dimensions and lore.
body:
DISCLAIMER: THIS MOD IS IN EARLY ALPHA AND NOT ALL ADVERTISED CONTENT IS IMPLEMENTED YET

SamuraiDestroy's Beyond (Formerly the Soul Mod) expands the game by adding multiple dimensions, its own story and lore, magic and more!

Each dimension/chapter has its own unique type of magic with lots of powerful, customisable spells, along with numerous mobs, both friendly and hostile and a series of bosses that need to be defeated before moving on to the next chapter and of course new gear and armor. The story is long and begins before you even load up a world with the mod. It is slowly revealed through the structures, bosses, secret notes and more. 

The mod has a heavy focus on exploration as the instructions for how to enter the Soul Dimension, Chapter I's dimension, are found in an overworld structure and most bosses are found in structures. 

Each massive update will be referred to as a chapter (e.g. the 1.0 update would be Chapter I's full release, the 2.0 update would be Chapter II's release etc.) and there are currently 5 planned chapters.
